series_metadata.series_title: Supporting Documents for OARRS Account Application
series_metadata.series_description: Description: Copies of personal and professional credentials that support an Ohio Automated RX Reporting System (OARRS) applicant’s identity for an OARRS user account and support the applicant’s identity to add delegates under their user account.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: be retained on OARRS server life of account
